FlipPerzero
this is
FliPperzero
A groundbreaking NFT game powered by its own coin, offering extensive utilities and endless possibilities.
About us
Flipper Zero Games merges mobile gaming with NFT technology, creating a community-driven ecosystem. We aim to develop 10 mobile casual games, driven by community input, funded by game revenue, and supported through NFT minting. This approach ensures sustainable development and community rewards.
Connect
GamE
Flipper Zero treasure hunt is an exciting and adventurous hidden object game that takes players on a journey through exotic locations in search of hidden treasures. With beautifully illustrated scenes and cleverly hidden items, players must use their keen eyes and problem-solving skills to uncover the secrets and riches of ancient civilizations.
